diagrams.title: Normalization Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows progression from unnormalized to BCNF with conditions at each level
diagrams.purpose: Understanding progression and requirements of each normal form

diagrams.title: Dependency Types Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows functional, partial and transitive dependencies visually
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing different dependency types that violate normal forms

diagrams.title: BCNF vs 3NF Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows condition differences between BCNF and 3NF using Venn diagram
elements: 3NF allows non-key determinant if RHS is prime
BCNF requires all determinants be superkeys
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when 3NF is sufficient vs when BCNF is needed

diagrams.title: Decomposition Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step decomposition from problematic relation to normalized tables
elements: All FDs preserved or lossless-join maintained
